task_statement: P7-B1 fresh-clone documentation + P7-criteria repair from the recorded P7 fresh-clone probe (project/brick-protocol/status/kernel/customer-ready-p7-fresh-clone-probe-0630.md). Close the three named gaps: G1 the documented first-run line uses bare `brick build`, but `brick` is only installed by install.sh pipx and can collide with an unrelated `brick` already on PATH on a fresh machine; present the install-free in-repo route `uv run python3 -m brick_protocol.support.operator.cli build ...` as a reliable first-run equivalent (or guarantee the pipx entrypoint before showing bare `brick`). G2 the documented design-contract-only first example does not reach frontier=complete on a fresh machine without a real provider (design/closure verdict nodes need a real codex/gemini CLI; top-level --adapter adapter:local does not override role nodes), so it is honest support evidence but not a frontier=complete proof; say so plainly. G3 there is no zero-real-provider path to a written frontier=complete (a work node with write_scope is rejected with missing_adapter_write_capability because adapter:local is a non-observed-write stub), so P7 PASS as written requires a real provider step; state that explicitly in the P7 criteria. Docs/criteria/status wording only. Do not claim P7/P8 complete. Do not change code, checkers, install script, onboarding, runtime, providers, route policy, or Movement literals.

nodes.work_statement: Read-only inspection. Read project/brick-protocol/status/kernel/customer-ready-p7-fresh-clone-probe-0630.md (the probe gap list G1/G2/G3), README.md first-run block, support/docs/references/{quickstart.md,setup.md,launch-guide.md} launch sections, and customer-ready-p7-p8-pass-criteria-0629.md P7 target. Produce a bounded edit map: exactly which lines to adjust for G1 (install-free uv run cli build route + brick-on-PATH caveat), G2 (first example is not frontier=complete without a real provider), G3 (P7 PASS requires a real provider step; adapter:local cannot write). Do not mutate files.

Thin docs/criteria edit only, using the incoming edit map. G1: in README + quickstart + setup + launch-guide, present `uv run python3 -m brick_protocol.support.operator.cli build --task ... --preset ... --adapter adapter:local` as the reliable install-free fresh-clone route alongside the bare `brick build` form, and add a one-line caveat that bare `brick` requires the install.sh pipx entrypoint and can collide with another `brick` on PATH. G2: mark the design-contract-only first example as honest support evidence that is NOT a frontier=complete proof without a real provider. G3: in customer-ready-p7-p8-pass-criteria-0629.md, state explicitly that a documented-steps-only P7 frontier=complete requires a real logged-in provider step, because adapter:local is a non-observed-write stub (a write-scoped work node is rejected with missing_adapter_write_capability) and verdict nodes reject adapter:local. Keep proof limits and Brick/Agent/Link language. Do not claim P7/P8 complete; do not touch code/checkers/install/onboarding.

Evidence-integrity QA. Inspect the doc/criteria diff against the probe note. Verify G1/G2/G3 wording matches the actual probe evidence (uv run cli build route works; design-contract-only example is agent_incomplete/not_ready without a real provider; write-scoped adapter:local work node is rejected). Verify no wording turns checker green or a not_ready example into P7 PASS, source truth, success, quality, or Movement authority. Run git diff --check and focused text searches. Do not source-mutate.

Read-only axis inspection. Verify Brick/Agent/Link boundaries in the repaired wording: support docs/CLI/install remain support evidence only; Link Movement stays forward/reroute; P7 PASS remains human/COO disposition after real evidence; the in-repo uv run cli route is described as the same official build surface, not a new route. Do not mutate files.

Closure synthesis for P7-B1. Fan in work, evidence-integrity QA, axis inspection. Return observed_evidence, narrowly_proven, not_proven, remaining_delta, next_target_candidates. Likely next target: a documented real-provider fresh-clone P7 run to reach frontier=complete, then P8 dogfood. If no real transition concern exists, return transition_concern_evidence null.
